query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white image showing a human figure in a hooded jacket, standing in a three-quarter view with arms crossed. The figure wears a dark hooded top over lighter-colored pants, with the hood raised and casting shadow over the head area. The subject stands against a plain, bright background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred black and white image where the human figure in a hooded jacket dissolves into sweeping streaks and gestural smears, the body barely cohering against an overexposed white void. The intentional blur transforms the subject into an abstract field of gray tonalities and directional energy, with facial features and bodily boundaries surrendering to pure movement and form.
